Bindings.Binding: -- The keystroke is re-routed to TotemsCastButton via -- SetOverrideBindingClick in Core.lua. This body is a no-op safety net -- in case the override hasn't been applied yet (e.g. mid-combat reload).
-- Re-routed to TotemsResetTwistButton via SetOverrideBindingClick. -- This body is a no-op safety net.
